subject: Subtomogram handedness
body:
Hi all,

I performed Warp-Relion-M pipeline for subtomogram averaging. I checked and 
confirmed the handedness of tilt series in Warp. But the averaged map from 
relion have flipped structure. Is it normal? It is an  important issue to 
analyze the orientational information from starfile. 

Thank you

Best,
Mingyu
